---
title: "github pages example"
format: html
---

#usethis::browse_github() takes you to github

## Course lessons

- [intro to quarto](scripts/intro-quarto.html)
- intro to git and [github](https://github.com/sjkjaer/training_kjaer)
- [cleaning and wrangling data](scripts/Tidy and wrangle.html)
- [visualizations](scripts/visualizations.html)

## Practice schedule

- practice I
- practice II
